summary: Templates and traceability rendering do not match the approved spec; authoring guidance still requests methodology in review.md. Requesting changes to update templates, flatten traceability, and update prompts/tests.

requirement_checks.requirement: PASS review renders new Factory Review header without legacy clutter
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md contains legacy banner: "✅ Autonomous review completed with decision **PASS**"
tests/process-review.test.mjs contains expectations for the old traceability layout and no assertion for a top-level '## Factory Review' header.

requirement_checks.requirement: REQUEST_CHANGES review shares layout and preserves detailed findings
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/review-request-changes.md retains legacy tokens such as '{{FULL_REVIEW_DETAILS}}' and a trailing 'Artifacts:' section.
No template in scripts/templates/github-messages/ matches the target '## Factory Review' summary block.

requirement_checks.requirement: Traceability appears as a single collapsible block in both comment and review.md
evidence: scripts/lib/review-output.mjs currently emits nested <details> blocks per requirement group rather than a single flattened <details> wrapper.
tests/review-artifacts.test.mjs and tests/process-review.test.mjs continue to exercise multi-<details> rendering behavior.

requirement_checks.requirement: Review authoring guidance omits manual methodology instruction
evidence: .factory/prompts/review.md still instructs reviewers to include the methodology line inside review.md.
No change to .factory/prompts/review.md was observed in the branch.

findings.title: Templates not updated to Factory Review summary
findings.details: Both PASS and REQUEST_CHANGES templates in 'scripts/templates/github-messages/' retain legacy layout and tokens instead of the new '## Factory Review' header and compact Summary/Findings/Artifacts block.
findings.recommendation: Update both templates to the shared dashboard-first layout specified in the run spec. Replace legacy banners and footers with the compact summary block and ensure tokens for artifact links and counts are present.

findings.title: Traceability rendering not flattened
findings.details: The canonical traceability renderer emits a separate <details> block per requirement group rather than a single <details> wrapper with flat subsections, which does not match the target experience.
findings.recommendation: Modify the traceability renderer to output a single '<details>' element with summary '🧭 Traceability' and inside it render plain Markdown subsections for each requirement group. Update or remove helpers that previously created nested details.

findings.title: Authoring prompt still asks to duplicate methodology
findings.details: The review authoring prompt instructs reviewers to include the methodology line inside 'review.md', which will be duplicated after the summary block is injected by the new comment assembly logic.
findings.recommendation: Remove or reword the instruction to stop asking reviewers to manually add the methodology line to 'review.md' and document that methodology is rendered automatically in the summary block.
